steps: Explain the three skills: dnd-build (guided level-1 character creation), dnd-check (audit an existing sheet for rules errors), dnd-lookup (look up any spell/feat/class rule from the catalogue)
Explain the grounding rule: all values come from data/*.json and engine/cli.mjs, never from the model's memory
Explain the engine workflow: options -> fill choices -> build -> 0 lint errors
